description: Implement Next.js API routes and Zod validators according to .loop/api-contracts.json.
promptInjections: API responses MUST use ok() / err() from src/lib/api-response.ts. Never hand-write { status_code, data, message }.
Every request body must be validated with Zod safeParse before use.
API endpoint fields must match .loop/api-contracts.json exactly. If a mismatch is discovered, stop and log a deviation.
